zh.lifeSummary: 當Sofie von Dassel於大約1141年出生在德國薩辛奧斯特包格時，她的父親Ludolf I von Dassel31歲，母親Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel30歲。她與Bernhard von Wölpe II結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1216年在德國尼德薩辛韓諾福韓諾福享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Dassel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vassell
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): of Norman origin, a status name from Old French vassel ‘vassal, servant, dependent’ (from Late Latin vazallus), used for a retainer who was under the protection of a king or powerful lord.

nameMeanings.name: Sofie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sophie
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sofie von Dassel was born about 1141, in Osterburg, Saxony, Germany, her father, Ludolf I von Dassel, was 31 and her mother, Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel, was 30. She married Bernhard von Wölpe II. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died in 1216, in Hannover, Hanover, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sofie von Dassel est née environ 1141, à Osterburg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Ludolf I von Dassel, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Bernhard von Wölpe II. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1216, à Hannover, Hannover, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sofie von Dassel um 1141 in Osterburg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ludolf I von Dassel 31 und ihre Mutter Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel 30. Sie hat Bernhard von Wölpe II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1216 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Hannover, Hannover, Niedersachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sofie von Dassel è nata il circa 1141 nel Osterburg, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Ludolf I von Dassel, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Bernhard von Wölpe II. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1216, nel Hannover, Hannover, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 76 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sofie von Dassel(이)가 대략 1141년 독일 작센 오스터버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ludolf I von Dassel(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Bernhard von Wölpe II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1216년 독일 니더작센 해노버 해노버에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sofie von Dassel родилась около 1141 г. в местности остирбург, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Ludolf I von Dassel было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernhard von Wölpe II. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1216 г. в местности ханновир, ханновир, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 76 лет.
